## What does this PR do?

<!-- One sentence summary -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `chore` — tooling, deps, config (no production code change)
- [ ] `refactor` — code improvement without behaviour change
- [ ] `style` — formatting only

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run type-check` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] Tested manually in the browser
- [ ] If schema changed: migration file included (`npx prisma migrate dev`)
- [ ] If AI operation added/changed: tested with a real provider
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or `.env` values committed
